{{nihongo|'''Kashima Shrine'''|鹿島神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

'奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 鹿島神社 |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}下田西1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|武甕槌大神}} |社格 = 旧指定{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}、{{jalink|式内社}}論社 |創建 = {{jalink|承安 (日本)|Q1194188|承安}}2年（{{jalink|1172年|Q19687}}） |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月16日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=鹿島神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''鹿島神社'''（'''鹿嶋神社'''、かしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}下田西にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 香芝（かしば）市の名前の由来となった神社である[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - 香芝市。 === 概要 === JR{{jalink|香芝駅|Q3655907}}の西方近隣、また{{jalink|近鉄大阪線|Q1052545}}の{{jalink|近鉄下田駅|Q6414373}}の北方近隣に鎮座している。 創建は{{jalink|承安 (日本)|Q1194188|承安}}2年（{{jalink|1172年|Q19687}}）3月、{{jalink|源義朝|Q532301}}の家臣であった{{jalink|鎌田政清|Q11651065}}の子・{{jalink|鎌田政光}}が{{jalink|常陸国|Q1055353}}（現・{{jalink|茨城県|Q83273}}）の{{jalink|鹿島神宮|Q706499}}から勧請したのが始まりとされる[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - 鹿島神社[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - 香芝市二上山博物館。 また、その鹿島神社の創建に先立って、当地には先行する古社があり、それが{{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427|大和国の式内社}}の1つである'''深溝神社'''（ふかみぞじんじゃ）であるという説も唱えられている。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|武甕槌大神}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - 公式サイト {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かしましんしや かしはし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:鹿島神社]]

'奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 鹿島神社 |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}下田西1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|武甕槌大神}} |社格 = 旧指定{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}、{{jalink|式内社}}論社 |創建 = {{jalink|承安 (日本)|Q1194188|承安}}2年（{{jalink|1172年|Q19687}}） |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月16日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=鹿島神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''鹿島神社'''（'''鹿嶋神社'''、かしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}下田西にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 香芝（かしば）市の名前の由来となった神社である[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - 香芝市。 === 概要 === JR{{jalink|香芝駅|Q3655907}}の西方近隣、また{{jalink|近鉄大阪線|Q1052545}}の{{jalink|近鉄下田駅|Q6414373}}の北方近隣に鎮座している。 創建は{{jalink|承安 (日本)|Q1194188|承安}}2年（{{jalink|1172年|Q19687}}）3月、{{jalink|源義朝|Q532301}}の家臣であった{{jalink|鎌田政清|Q11651065}}の子・{{jalink|鎌田政光}}が{{jalink|常陸国|Q1055353}}（現・{{jalink|茨城県|Q83273}}）の{{jalink|鹿島神宮|Q706499}}から勧請したのが始まりとされる[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - 鹿島神社[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - 香芝市二上山博物館。 また、その鹿島神社の創建に先立って、当地には先行する古社があり、それが{{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427|大和国の式内社}}の1つである'''深溝神社'''（ふかみぞじんじゃ）であるという説も唱えられている。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|武甕槌大神}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - 公式サイト {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かしましんしや かしはし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:鹿島神社]] [[Category:pages]]

'奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 鹿島神社 |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}下田西1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|武甕槌大神}} |社格 = 旧指定{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}、{{jalink|式内社}}論社 |創建 = {{jalink|承安 (日本)|Q1194188|承安}}2年（{{jalink|1172年|Q19687}}） |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月16日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=鹿島神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''鹿島神社'''（'''鹿嶋神社'''、かしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}下田西にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 香芝（かしば）市の名前の由来となった神社である[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - 香芝市。 === 概要 === JR{{jalink|香芝駅|Q3655907}}の西方近隣、また{{jalink|近鉄大阪線|Q1052545}}の{{jalink|近鉄下田駅|Q6414373}}の北方近隣に鎮座している。 創建は{{jalink|承安 (日本)|Q1194188|承安}}2年（{{jalink|1172年|Q19687}}）3月、{{jalink|源義朝|Q532301}}の家臣であった{{jalink|鎌田政清|Q11651065}}の子・{{jalink|鎌田政光}}が{{jalink|常陸国|Q1055353}}（現・{{jalink|茨城県|Q83273}}）の{{jalink|鹿島神宮|Q706499}}から勧請したのが始まりとされる[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - 鹿島神社[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - 香芝市二上山博物館。 また、その鹿島神社の創建に先立って、当地には先行する古社があり、それが{{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427|大和国の式内社}}の1つである'''深溝神社'''（ふかみぞじんじゃ）であるという説も唱えられている。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|武甕槌大神}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - 公式サイト {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かしましんしや かしはし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:鹿島神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}下田西1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|武甕槌大神}} |社格 = 旧指定{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}、{{jalink|式内社}}論社 |創建 = {{jalink|承安 (日本)|Q1194188|承安}}2年（{{jalink|1172年|Q19687}}） |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月16日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=鹿島神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''鹿島神社'''（'''鹿嶋神社'''、かしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}下田西にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 香芝（かしば）市の名前の由来となった神社である[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - 香芝市。 === 概要 === JR{{jalink|香芝駅|Q3655907}}の西方近隣、また{{jalink|近鉄大阪線|Q1052545}}の{{jalink|近鉄下田駅|Q6414373}}の北方近隣に鎮座している。 創建は{{jalink|承安 (日本)|Q1194188|承安}}2年（{{jalink|1172年|Q19687}}）3月、{{jalink|源義朝|Q532301}}の家臣であった{{jalink|鎌田政清|Q11651065}}の子・{{jalink|鎌田政光}}が{{jalink|常陸国|Q1055353}}（現・{{jalink|茨城県|Q83273}}）の{{jalink|鹿島神宮|Q706499}}から勧請したのが始まりとされる[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - 鹿島神社[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - 香芝市二上山博物館。 また、その鹿島神社の創建に先立って、当地には先行する古社があり、それが{{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427|大和国の式内社}}の1つである'''深溝神社'''（ふかみぞじんじゃ）であるという説も唱えられている。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|武甕槌大神}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - 公式サイト {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かしましんしや かしはし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:鹿島神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Fukamisono Shrine|lt=Fukamisono Shrine|WD=Q135038956}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 鹿島神社 |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}下田西1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|武甕槌大神}} |社格 = 旧指定{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}、{{jalink|式内社}}論社 |創建 = {{jalink|承安 (日本)|Q1194188|承安}}2年（{{jalink|1172年|Q19687}}） |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月16日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=鹿島神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''鹿島神社'''（'''鹿嶋神社'''、かしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}下田西にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 香芝（かしば）市の名前の由来となった神社である[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - 香芝市。 === 概要 === JR{{jalink|香芝駅|Q3655907}}の西方近隣、また{{jalink|近鉄大阪線|Q1052545}}の{{jalink|近鉄下田駅|Q6414373}}の北方近隣に鎮座している。 創建は{{jalink|承安 (日本)|Q1194188|承安}}2年（{{jalink|1172年|Q19687}}）3月、{{jalink|源義朝|Q532301}}の家臣であった{{jalink|鎌田政清|Q11651065}}の子・{{jalink|鎌田政光}}が{{jalink|常陸国|Q1055353}}（現・{{jalink|茨城県|Q83273}}）の{{jalink|鹿島神宮|Q706499}}から勧請したのが始まりとされる[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - 鹿島神社[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - 香芝市二上山博物館。 また、その鹿島神社の創建に先立って、当地には先行する古社があり、それが{{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427|大和国の式内社}}の1つである'''深溝神社'''（ふかみぞじんじゃ）であるという説も唱えられている。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|武甕槌大神}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - 公式サイト {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かしましんしや かしはし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:鹿島神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

'奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 鹿島神社 |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}下田西1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|武甕槌大神}} |社格 = 旧指定{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}、{{jalink|式内社}}論社 |創建 = {{jalink|承安 (日本)|Q1194188|承安}}2年（{{jalink|1172年|Q19687}}） |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月16日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=鹿島神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''鹿島神社'''（'''鹿嶋神社'''、かしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}下田西にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 香芝（かしば）市の名前の由来となった神社である[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - 香芝市。 === 概要 === JR{{jalink|香芝駅|Q3655907}}の西方近隣、また{{jalink|近鉄大阪線|Q1052545}}の{{jalink|近鉄下田駅|Q6414373}}の北方近隣に鎮座している。 創建は{{jalink|承安 (日本)|Q1194188|承安}}2年（{{jalink|1172年|Q19687}}）3月、{{jalink|源義朝|Q532301}}の家臣であった{{jalink|鎌田政清|Q11651065}}の子・{{jalink|鎌田政光}}が{{jalink|常陸国|Q1055353}}（現・{{jalink|茨城県|Q83273}}）の{{jalink|鹿島神宮|Q706499}}から勧請したのが始まりとされる[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - 鹿島神社[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - 香芝市二上山博物館。 また、その鹿島神社の創建に先立って、当地には先行する古社があり、それが{{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427|大和国の式内社}}の1つである'''深溝神社'''（ふかみぞじんじゃ）であるという説も唱えられている。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|武甕槌大神}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - 公式サイト {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かしましんしや かしはし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:鹿島神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Kashima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かしましんしや かしはし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:鹿島神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Kashima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かしましんしや かしはし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:鹿島神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Kashima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かしましんしや かしはし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:鹿島神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Kashima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:鹿島神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Kashima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:鹿島神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Kashima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:鹿島神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Kashima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Kashima Shrines]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Kashima Shrines]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Kashima Shrines]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Kashima Shrines]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Kashima Shrines]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Kashima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Kashima Shrines]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Kashima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Kashima Shrines]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]] [[Category:moved from a redlink]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Kashima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Kashima Shrines]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]] [[Category:Qq old]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Kashima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Kashima Shrines]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]] [[Category:Qq old]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Kashima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Kashima Shrines]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Qq old]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Kashima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Kashima Shrines]] [[Category:Qq old]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Kashima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|WD=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|WD=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|WD=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|WD=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|WD=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|WD=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|WD=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|WD=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|WD=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Kashima Shrines]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県香芝市西下田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹿島神社 (香芝市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135069030}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Kashima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kashima-jinja Kashiba201806.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|qid=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}} Shimoda-nishi 1-9-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} |社格 = former designated {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|qid=Q19687|1=1172}} (Shōan 2) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 16 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Kashima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Kashima Shrine''' ('''Kashima Shrine''', かしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoda-nishi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba|Q696643|qid=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is the shrine from which the name of Kashiba City is said to derive[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/5/3826.html 香芝市の沿革] - Kashiba City. === Overview === It is enshrined near west of JR {{ill|lt=Kashiba Station|Q3655907|qid=Q3655907|1=Kashiba Station}}, and near north of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Shimoda Station|Q6414373|qid=Q6414373|1=Kintetsu Shimoda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|qid=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Its founding is said to begin in March {{ill|lt=1172|Q19687|qid=Q19687|1=1172}} ({{ill|lt=Shōan (Japan)|Q1194188|qid=Q1194188|lt=Shōan|1=Jōan (era)}} 2), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamada Masamitsu|1=UNKNOWN}}, son of {{ill|lt=Kamada Masakiyo|Q11651065|qid=Q11651065|1=Kamata Masakiyo}} (a retainer of {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|Q532301|qid=Q532301|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}), invited the deity from {{ill|lt=Kashima Jingū|Q706499|qid=Q706499|1=Kashima Jingū}} in {{ill|lt=Hitachi Province|Q1055353|qid=Q1055353|1=Hitachi Province}} (present-day {{ill|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|Q83273|qid=Q83273|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}})[https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/top-page/history/ 由緒] - Kashima Shrine[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1653.pdf 鹿島神社] - Kashiba Nijō-san Museum. There is also a theory that before the founding of this Kashima Shrine, an older local shrine existed here, namely '''Fukamizo Shrine''', one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|qid=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://kashiba-no-kashima.org/ 鹿島神社] - official site {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kashima Shrine (Kashiba City)]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kashima Shrine (worship)]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Kashima Shrines]]
